title: Garnished American Peppers Toast
description: Herbal, juicy, romantic American dish featuring pul biber, toasted bread, and raw-friendly toppings that combine to create a vibrant lunch option.

ingredients.name: avocado
ingredients.notes: mashed with lemon juice, salt, pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F and toast the sourdough bread slices until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
While the bread toasts, mash the avocado with a squeeze of lemon juice, salt, pepper, and a pinch of pul biber until smooth.
Slice the cherry tomatoes in halves and crumble the feta cheese into small pieces.
Spread the mashed avocado evenly over each toasted slice of bread.
Sprinkle pul biber over the avocado, then arrange the cherry tomato halves and feta crumbles on top.
Drizzle a thin layer of olive oil across the toast to add richness.
If desired, sprinkle a few drops of lemon zest for extra aroma and color.
Serve immediately as a fresh, herbal lunch that pairs well with a light salad or soup.
